style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<div align="center"><b>Suggested contact plan and resulting</b><b>&nbsp;multigraph for home region B :</b></div><div align="center">Create&nbsp;virtual node (vnode) 8 to allow anycast to groupe [3, 4] (associated contacts are duplicated / referenced).
